hooks.command: FILE=$(jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // .tool_input.path // empty' 2>/dev/null); [ -n "$FILE" ] && echo "$FILE" | grep -qE '/(global|custom)/' && echo 'Docs out of sync — run /ak:sync-docs to update README.md, CLAUDE.md, AGENTS.md' || true

[ -d .gitnexus ] && echo '{"hookSpecificOutput":{"hookEventName":"PreToolUse","additionalContext":"gitnexus: Knowledge graph exists in .gitnexus/. Read .gitnexus/ for codebase structure before searching raw files."}}' || true
